title: Torpedo Bay
writer: Alberto Ca' Zorzi Noventa, Adriano Belli, Pino Belli
actors: Lilli Palmer, James Mason, Gabriele Ferzetti
plot: An Italian submarine captain tries to navigate his sub through enemy waters whilst being stalked by a British commander (James Mason). The Italian sub manages to make it into the neutral port of Tangiers, followed by the British c...
